base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of damnd_thrasher — a character (boss) from 1989 final fight. Damnd (US) / Thrasher (JP) — Stage 1 boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Damnd (US) / Thrasher (JP) — Stage 1 boss; whistle-summons gang-reinforcements
